chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Cr. Bail Appl. No.1502 of 2024 (Muhammad Owais Khan vs. The State) Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of Bail Application. 14.10.2024. Syed Ahmed Ail Shah, advocate for applicant a/w applicant Complainant, in person Mr. Khadim Hussain, Addl: PG Sindh O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Complainant, who is an advocate by profession has lodged this FIR against applicant and others u/s 337A(i), 324, 506-B, 34 PPC alleging that he and his brother on the issue of providing water to neighbours quarreled and beat him severally on 16.06.2024 causing multiple injuries to him. 2. Complainant is present and has opposed bail, however, learned Addl: PG Sindh has conceded on the ground that section 324 PCC has been deleted in the investigation. The injury sustained by applicant fall u/s 337A(i), which is bailable. More so, I have seen that there is prima facie delay of ten days in registration of FIR. On such grounds this bail application is allowed and ad- interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant order dated 08.07.2024 is hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions. 3. Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. JUDGE Rafiq/P.A
